title: Discover our new product, Teamwork Collection, from the switcher
description: We built a new way to collaborate! Discover and sign up for Teamwork Collection, directly from the switcher. With Teamwork Collection, your team gets the best of Atlassian in one package: Jira to organize and deliver projects, Confluence to document and share knowledge, Loom to communicate visually, and Rovo to unlock AI-powered productivity. Together, these apps connect the dots across work—from planning and execution to communication and insights—so your projects stay aligned and your people s
